title: The Last of us - Zombie Apocalypse
description:
The closest you can get to The last of us.
BEST WHEN PLAYED WITH SIMPLE ANIMATED GUNS!
THIS MOD IS IN VERY EARLY DEVELOPMENT!
body:
THE LAST OF US
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod includes 5 systems (for now) :
INFECTION: All the current infected attack most animals and also villagers and players. After killing them they spawn a runner.

EVOLUTION: 3 min and 20 seconds (4000 ticks) after spawning runners have a 1/2 chance to evolve into Stalkers, then the stalkers have a 1/3 chance to evolve into shamblers.

HORDES: Hordes have a 1/10 chance of spawning after you inhale noxious gas, so try not to get too close to shamblers when not needed (unless you have a gas mask). They also spawn naturally but that is very rare.

RAT KINGS: Rat kings spawn very rarely and they spawn a stalker, a clicker, a bloater and two runners when killed.

FIRE WEAKNESS: Large infected have a lot of fat on them, and because of that they are VERY flamable. Setting them on fire will make them slow and will make the damage dealt to them much higher. Smaller infected aren't affected by this (runner,stalker,shambler,clicker).

CORDYCEPS: Cordyceps spawns on grass and it deals a lot of damage. It also shreds armor.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Misc. mob abilities:

THROW: Bloaters can throw noxious sacks (Noxious sacks deal a ton of damage if its a direct hit). Noxious sackes release noxious gas.

NOXIOUS GAS: Shamblers can release noxious gas in the air if they are close enough. That ability does a lot of damage and it also negates regeneration, you can very easily tell when a shambler is releasing noxious gas as there will be green particles everywhere. If you have a gas mask noxious gas wont damage you.

FARSIGHT AND STALKING: Stalkers can see you from very far away. They also try to attack you from the back.

THE LAST STAND: Crawlers have a 1/3 chance of spawning after a runner is killed. They have much less health than the Runner and they are slower than the runner.

ENCHANCED HEARING: Clickers don't see anything... but that does not make them any less dangeorus... they have really good hearing so if you are not crouching when close to a clicker for longer than like 3 seconds it will start hunting you. They now have an animation for getting mad that makes it very easy to tell when they get agressive.

HOLDING: Infected can now hold you.

DOOR BREAKING: Infected can now break doors.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

MOBS: Runner (+ Crawler), Stalker, Shambler, Clicker, Rat king
NATURAL GENERATION STRUCTURES: House, Tent, Tower, Gun store THE STRUCTURES INCLUDE GUNS FROM SIMPLE ANIMATED GUNS BUT ITS NOT A DEPENDANCY
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

PLANS:

-Infestation - the spreading of the infection

-Add a stalker block that is placed on random walls and converts into stalkers, add infected wolves that bite you, add bandits
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

SHOWCASE: https://youtu.be/deLsfeMsLJs?si=eHpbsvmzAydzswV_
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEPENDANCIES (for fabric): fabric api, geckolib (for forge): geckolib

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/QCfYuHhDsG
